I wait and wait, but nobody turn up. To my surprise, the neighbour boy, come up to me, give me his new bicycle to ride until my friend return. We go for a long round in his cycle and come back to find my friend back home, who is in a very grumpy mood, because the bicycle that his neighbour bring was my friends’. It was weird, but we have a hearty laugh.
